creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Created attachment 199055
irc/znc-push: Update to 1.0.0.167

Updates irc/znc-push to 1.0.0.167 which added notification support for channel and private notices.

While here, tell portscout to ignore versions v2.0.0-{rc,dev}, which are old release candidates from the seemingly abandoned Python branch.
